item.title: Midnight the cat was caught lying on his resume in order to become a security dog. He’s good at the job, so he will be keeping the position. 🐈‍⬛ Photo originally posted by u/Nikachuu on reddit. Follow for news that makes you smile every day! 🥰 #catsoft
